svg.title: DocPilot multimodal RAG pipeline
svg.desc: Full pipeline from PDF upload through extraction, summarization, embedding, retrieval, reranking, and GPT-4o answer generation

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the PDF upload and save step work in DocPilot?')
g.text: Streamlit file uploader → saved to uploads/

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does unstructured extract text, tables, and images from a PDF?')
g.text: strategy=fast → Text / NarrativeText / Title / Table / images

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is raw text stored in DocPilot?')
sendPrompt('How are tables summarized in DocPilot?')
sendPrompt('How are images summarized using GPT-4o vision?')
sendPrompt('What is a LangChain Document and how are they created in DocPilot?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI embeddings and FAISS vector store work in DocPilot?')
sendPrompt('How does the user query flow through the retrieval pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does FAISS similarity search work? What is k=10?')
g.text: top k=10 docs · bi-encoder · fast but coarse

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does CrossEncoder reranking improve results over FAISS alone?')
sendPrompt('How does the final RAG prompt work to generate the answer?')
